name: Soundtrack to Our Teenage Zombie Apocalypse
original_name: Soundtrack to Our Teenage Zombie Apocalypse
overview: What do you do when you get trapped in the ABC building during a zombie apocalypse? Write a song about it. Four music obsessed teens are on a mission to win triple j Unearthed High - so the end of the world will have to wait.

trailers.title: #STOTZA Promo Drop 🎤🧟 | Soundtrack To Our Teenage Zombie Apocalypse | ABC ME
